blended.narrative: Tremblant is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light rain showers, highs of 48°F.
Monday: light freezing rain, highs of 50°F.
Wednesday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
